name: Foundations 3-Day
description: A balanced full-body program for beginners. Three workouts per week, hits every major movement pattern, builds confidence and strength without overwhelm. Recommended starting point.

name: Upper / Lower 4-Day
description: Four workouts per week split into upper-body and lower-body days. More volume per muscle group, better for users training consistently who want faster progress.

name: Push / Pull / Legs 3-Day
description: Classic three-way split — pushing movements one day, pulling another, legs the third. Good for users who like clean separation by muscle group.

name: Home Minimal 3-Day
description: Three full-body workouts using bodyweight only — no equipment needed. Perfect for travel, no-equipment days, or beginners not yet ready to invest in weights.
